plan.failureSummary: The page.ai flow marked the objective as not completable because the briefcase.chat service requires either a paid subscription plan or a user-provided OpenAI API Key in the settings panel to generate chat responses. Without pre-configured credentials or keys injected during execution, conversational flow evaluation cannot proceed.
observedIndicators: API key requirement detected in settings modal

remediationSteps.summary: Inject OpenAI API Key or premium subscription credentials into the test environment
remediationSteps.details: Provide a valid OpenAI API key or testing account credentials in the environment variables, then modify the test flow/logic to input this key into the settings modal prior to testing the chatbot conversation.

plan.notes: The agent correctly explored the page, detected that responses were not streaming back, checked settings under 'Advanced', and observed that either an OpenAI API key or a premium subscription is required to run queries.
